task_params.title: Recurring Editorial Bottlenecks Summary
report_points: late approvals from department leads delay final publishing dates
version confusion across shared drafts creates duplicate edits
translation review arrives too close to layout deadlines
fact-check questions sit unresolved without a single owner
freelancer onboarding gaps slow assignment starts
manual status updates make the editorial calendar unreliable
